title: Sunday Worship Service
description: Weekly Sunday worship service open to all. Come and experience the presence of God through praise, prayer, and the preaching of His Word.

title: Prayer & Fasting Night
description: Midweek corporate prayer and fasting. We gather to seek God's face, intercede for our families, nation, and the lost.

title: Youth Night
description: A Friday night gathering for the youth — worship, Word, and fellowship. Bring a friend and expect God to move!

title: Bible Study
description: In-depth Bible study and discussion for all ages. This week we continue our series through the book of Romans.

title: Community Outreach
description: Monthly community feeding and gospel sharing in the urban poor areas of Paco, Manila. Volunteers and donations welcome.

title: Couples Fellowship
description: A special evening for married couples — worship, teaching on godly marriage, and dinner together. Register in advance.

title: Holy Communion Sunday
description: First Sunday of the month Communion service. We remember Christ's sacrifice through bread and cup as one body.

title: Men's Prayer Breakfast
description: Monthly gathering for men to pray, share, and encourage one another over breakfast. All men of the church are welcome.

title: Missions Night
description: Last Friday of the month missions update and prayer — hear from our field missionaries and support the Great Commission.

title: Easter Sunday Celebration
description: Join us for our sunrise Easter celebration! He is risen! Special music, baptisms, and a powerful message on the resurrection of Christ.

title: Good Friday Service
description: A solemn Good Friday worship service reflecting on the cross of Christ — readings, music, and a message on the finished work of Jesus.

title: Leadership Summit
description: Quarterly leadership development gathering for cell leaders, ministry heads, and volunteers. Theme: Servant Leadership after the heart of Christ.

title: Women's Ministry Gathering
description: Last Sunday women's get-together for worship, sharing, and encouragement. A safe space for women to grow in faith and friendship.

title: Children's Church
description: Sunday school and kids worship every week — age-appropriate Bible lessons, activities, and songs that make faith come alive for children.

title: ONE Discipleship Group
description: Victory's personal discipleship program where believers are mentored one-on-one or in small groups through the Foundations series.

title: Young Couples Conference
description: A special conference for young couples — building godly marriages and families grounded in faith.

title: Worship Team Conference
description: A dedicated conference for worship team members to be equipped, trained, and spiritually refreshed for ministry.

title: Holy Spirit Baptism
description: A special service for the laying on of hands and prayer for the baptism of the Holy Spirit.

title: Water Baptism
description: Water baptism service for new believers making a public declaration of faith in Jesus Christ.

title: Senior Deacons Conference
description: A gathering of senior deacons for prayer, planning, and alignment in church leadership and ministry direction.

title: Crusade in Housing
description: Gospel crusade and evangelism outreach held within a housing community. Bringing the message of salvation to the neighborhood.

title: Leaders Conference
description: Church-wide leaders conference for ministry leaders to gather, be equipped, and receive vision and direction for the year.

title: HYCS Recognition & Graduation Day
description: Recognition and graduation ceremony for HYCS students — celebrating academic achievements and faith milestones.

title: Palm Sunday
description: Palm Sunday service commemorating the triumphal entry of Jesus Christ into Jerusalem. Beginning of Holy Week.

title: Mahanaim Camp
description: Three-day camp running April 2–4 (Thursday to Saturday) for spiritual renewal, fellowship, and encounter with God.

title: Easter Sunday
description: Resurrection Sunday celebration — He is risen! Join us for a powerful Easter worship service proclaiming the victory of Christ.

title: Kids Camp
description: Three-day kids camp running April 15–17 (Wednesday to Friday) — a fun-filled, faith-building experience for children.

title: Agape Church 8th Anniversary
description: Celebrating 8 years of God's faithfulness! Join us for a special anniversary worship service and celebration.

title: Spirit Team Camp
description: Three-day Spirit Team Camp running April 29 – May 1 (Wednesday to Friday) for spiritual formation and team building.

title: Mother's Day
description: A special Sunday service honoring mothers and celebrating the gift of motherhood. All moms are welcome and appreciated.

title: Daily Vacation Bible School (DVBS)
description: Three-day DVBS running May 12–14 (Tuesday to Thursday) — a fun and faith-filled Bible school program for children during vacation.

title: San Diego Church 13th Anniversary
description: Celebrating 13 years of God's grace and faithfulness over San Diego Church. A joyful worship and anniversary celebration.

title: Non-Stop Worship
description: A continuous, uninterrupted worship night — pressing into the presence of God through extended praise and prayer.

title: 2026–2027 HYCS Orientation & Class Opening
description: Official orientation and class opening for the new 2026–2027 HYCS school year. Welcome to new and returning students!

title: Wedding
description: A sacred wedding ceremony celebrating the union of a couple in holy matrimony before God and the church.

title: Father's Day
description: A special Sunday service honoring fathers and celebrating godly fatherhood in the home and church.

title: Holy Spirit Baptism
description: A special service for the laying on of hands and prayer for the baptism of the Holy Spirit.

title: Water Baptism
description: Water baptism service for believers making a public declaration of their faith in Jesus Christ.

title: Wedding
description: A sacred wedding ceremony celebrating the union of a couple in holy matrimony before God and the church.

title: Memory Verse Competition by Church
description: In-church Memory Verse competition — encouraging members to memorize and recite Scripture with faith and confidence.

title: Overall Memory Verse Competition
description: The overall Memory Verse competition bringing together participants from multiple churches or groups for the grand finals.

title: Somang Church 3rd Anniversary
description: Celebrating 3 years of Somang Church — honoring God's faithfulness and the growth of this congregation.

title: Teachers Conference
description: A dedicated conference for teachers and educators in the church — equipping and encouraging those who teach God's Word.

title: Adult Camp
description: Two-day adult camp running August 30–31 (Sunday to Monday) for spiritual refreshing, fellowship, and deeper encounter with God.

title: Holy Spirit Baptism
description: A special service for the laying on of hands and prayer for the baptism of the Holy Spirit.

title: Water Baptism
description: Water baptism service for believers making a public declaration of their faith in Jesus Christ.

title: Buntong Palay Church 19th Anniversary
description: Celebrating 19 years of God's faithfulness over Buntong Palay Church — a joyful anniversary worship celebration.

title: Teacher's Appreciation Day
description: A special Sunday dedicated to honoring and appreciating the teachers and educators of the church and HYCS school.

title: Maganda Church 15th Anniversary
description: Celebrating 15 years of Maganda Church — honoring God's grace and the journey of faith of this congregation.

title: Central 21st Anniversary
description: Celebrating 21 years of Central Church — a milestone anniversary service giving thanks for God's enduring faithfulness.

title: Pastors & Ministers Appreciation Day
description: A special day set aside to honor and celebrate the pastors and ministers who faithfully serve the congregation.

title: Pastors & Ministers Conference
description: Four-day conference for pastors and ministers running October 26–29 (Monday to Thursday) — a time for equipping, vision, and spiritual renewal.

title: Thanksgiving Sunday
description: A special Thanksgiving service to offer praise and gratitude to God for His blessings and faithfulness throughout the year.

title: Soulympic
description: Soulympic — a faith-themed games and fellowship event bringing the church together in fun, unity, and competitive spirit.

title: Holy Spirit Baptism
description: A special service for the laying on of hands and prayer for the baptism of the Holy Spirit.

title: Water Baptism
description: Water baptism service for believers making a public declaration of their faith in Jesus Christ.

title: Crusade in Housing
description: Gospel crusade and evangelism outreach held within a housing community — sharing the Christmas message of hope and salvation.

title: Memory Verse Competition
description: Memory Verse competition showcasing the Scripture memorization of church members in a festive year-end event.

title: Christmas Worship
description: A special Christmas worship service celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. Come and adore Him!

title: Christmas Vacation
description: Christmas vacation break running December 28–30. Wishing everyone a blessed and restful holiday season.
